note: Same build tasks, built once WITH the kit pack (tokens + recipes + contract) and once WITHOUT. `uicockpit check --strict` scores drift from the contract. The delta is the evidence.

prompts.prompt: Build a settings form: a card with a title 'Profile', three labeled fields (Full name text input, Email text input, a Plan select with Free/Pro/Scale), inline validation showing an error under Email, and a footer action row with a secondary Cancel button and a primary Save button.

Build an invoices table with columns Invoice #, Client, Amount (right-aligned, currency), Status (a coloured badge: Paid/Overdue/Draft), and Due date. Five rows of realistic data. Above the table, a toolbar with a search field on the left and a primary 'New invoice' button on the right.

Build a three-tier pricing section: Free, Pro, Scale. Each is a card with the plan name, a price, four feature bullet points, and a call-to-action button. Highlight the Pro tier as the recommended plan with a primary button; the others use a secondary/ghost button.

Build a dashboard header: a page title 'Overview', a segmented control to switch date range (7 days / 30 days / All-time), and a row of four KPI stat tiles (Revenue, Active users, Churn, MRR) each showing a small label, a big number, and a +/- delta versus last period (green for up, red for down).

Build four inline alert messages stacked vertically: one informational, one success, one warning, one danger/error. Each has a leading status icon, a short message, and a dismiss (x) button. Use the conventional status colours.

Build a centered login card: a heading 'Sign in', an email field, a password field, a 'Remember me' checkbox, a primary 'Sign in' button that spans the card width, and a muted 'Forgot password?' link below.
